eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kansas; at 11:50 PM on JUN 8, 2026 Effective until 12:50 AM JUN 9, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a coordinated monthly test of all broadcast stations in Kansas and the Kansas City metropolitan area, sent from the Kansas Division of Emergency Management in Topeka.
